accountRecoveryCancel: I don't want recover my account.
accountRecoveryNewPasswordText: An email with a verification code has been sent to you. Please enter the code below and set a new password.
accountRecoveryStartText: Enter your username or email address to start account recovery. You’ll be able to set a new password during this process. Two-factor authentication will be disabled.
accountRecoverySuccessText: Your password has been updated and two-factor authentication has been disabled. You can now sign in and set up 2FA again.
cachePurgedError: The cache directory could not be purged!
cachePurgedSuccess: The cache directory got purged successfully!
caption: Caption
changesLoseConfirmationHint: Are you sure you want to continue?
collapsibleTooltipGroup: Elements sharing the same group name behave like a typical accordion menu where opening one item closes all others.
componentConfirmRemoval: Do you really want to delete this component?
componentsHint: In this section, you can create reusable content components that can be placed in block editors using the "Component" block. Components can consist of multiple blocks. They can be edited centrally here and at the same time are automatically updated across the entire website.
componentsSavingError: An error occured while saving components!
composerAuthInfo: In order to be able to install packages from a public or private repository, you have to authenticate to the platform where the repository is hosted using a private access token. This token only requires read access to the platform API and should not have any other permissions.
composerAuthResetConfirm: Do you really want to reset your repository authentication settings? All tokens will be permanently deleted.
composerAuthResetSuccess: Successfully cleared the repository auth configuration
confirmCancelUpload: Do you want to cancel the upload?
confirmDeletePage: Do you want to delete the current page?
confirmDeleteSelectedFiles: Do you want to delete the selected files?
cropSizeLowerThanResizedWarning: Note, the selected crop area is lower than the applied resize which might cause quality decrease
customConsentButtonPrimaryColorBorder: Cookie consent: Primary button border color
customConsentButtonPrimaryColorText: Cookie consent: Primary button text color
customConsentButtonSecondaryColorBorder: Cookie consent: Secondary button border color
customConsentButtonSecondaryColorText: Cookie consent: Secondary button text color
customConsentInfo: Automad will automatically show a cookie consent banner when embedded third-party content is detected. Here you can define a custom banner text as well as custom button labels and colors.
customHTMLBodyEnd: Custom HTML to be injected right before the closing body tag
customHTMLHead: Custom HTML to injected into the head element
customJSBodyEnd: Custom JavaScript to be injected right before the closing body tag
customJSHead: Custom JavaScript to be injected into the head element
customOpenGraphImageColorBackground: Custom background color for Open-Graph images
customOpenGraphImageColorText: Custom text color for Open-Graph images
customOpenGraphInfo: You can custommize the foreground and background colors of the Open-Graph images that are created automatically by Automad.
customization: This section allows for adding custom CSS and JavaScript to your site. The HTML fields can be used to add external resources such as fonts or JavaScript libraries.
customizationMerge: Note that JavaScript, CSS and HTML customizations defined here only affect this page and are appended to other customizations defined in the global settings section.
customizationTemplate: The follwing settings are specific to the currently chosen template and can be used to customize its look and feel.
definedInServerEnv: This setting is defined in the server environment and cannot be changed
discardDraftConfirm: Do you really want to discard your unpublished changes? Please note that this action can't be undone.
discardDraftTooltip: Discard draft and revert to the last published version
discardImageChanges: Are you sure you want to close the editor without saving changes to the image?
diskQuotaExceeded: The disk quota is exceeded. Please free up some space before adding new content.
dropFilesOrClick: Drop files here or click to browse
duplicatingPageProgress: Please wait. A copy of this page will be available in a few seconds.
editorSmallDisplayAlert: The display is too small for using the block editor. Please change to a larger device for editing.
emailAutomatic: This email has been sent automatically. Please do not reply to this email.
emailInviteSubject: You have been added as a new user!
emailInviteText: a new user account on {} has been created for you. You can use the button below to create your password.
emailRequiredError: Please enter a valid email address
emailResetPasswordTextBottom: In case you did not initiate this request yourself, you can safely ignore this message.
emailResetPasswordTextTop: the requested authentication token for your account on {} can be found below. You can use that token in order to create a new password for you now.
flexAlignCenter: Vertically align content to the center
flexAlignStretch: Stretch content from top to bottom
flexFillRow: Stretch content in order to fill row
heading: Heading
imageCaption: Image caption that is displayed in gallery and slideshow blocks
imageSlideshowBlockBreakpoints: Number of images based on block size
imageSlideshowBlockBreakpointsError: Please enter valid breakpoints that include block width and image width separate by a colon.
imageSlideshowBlockBreakpointsHelp: Add breakpoints as pairs of a minimum block size and a number of images per view, separated by a colon. Multiple breakpoints can be separated by whitespace.
invalidFormError:
Incomplete or incorrect data!
All fields are required and have to be completed as described!
invalidUsernameError: A username must start and end with a letter or number and can only contain the characters "a-z", "0-9", "_" or "-".
mailBlockDefaultError: An error occurred while sending mail.
mailBlockDefaultErrorAddress: A valid email address is required
mailBlockDefaultSuccess: The mail has been sent successfully.
maintenanceModeText: The server is under maintenance. All content stays accessible to visitors as usual but is currently read-only. Grap a quick coffee and as soon as maintenance is finished you can resume editing.
missingEmailAlertBody: There is currently no email address associated with your user account. In order to be able to receive password reset emails or other system notifications you can add an email address inside the user settings.
missingTargetPageError: Please select a page as destination!
name: Name
noComponentsFound: No components found. Please open the component editor first in order to create your first component.
noThemesFound: There are no themes and templates installed!
openGraphImage: Open-Graph Image (leave blank in order to use the automatically generated image)
openGraphImageShared: Open-Graph Image (overrides automatically generated open-graph images sitewide)
packageIsDependency: This package is a dependency of another package and therefore cannot be removed.
packageIsDependencyError: The package is required by another package.
packageRegistryFetchError: The package registry is currently unavailable.
packagesInfo: Browse and install carefully curated free and open-source themes. These themes let you quickly enhance your site’s appearance and functionality, and they can be installed right away without any additional setup or configuration.
packagesOverview: Theme packages are a way to extend your site’s functionality and design. You can choose to install free theme packages from the public Automad theme collection or your own private repositories that are hosted on GitHub or GitLab.
pageHistoryNoRevision: This page has no revisions yet.
pageHistoryRestoreHomeConfirm: Do you want to restore the page in place?
pageHistoryRestoreHomeText: Restore an older version of the homepage in place.
pageHistoryRestoreText: Restore an older version of the current page as a copy.
pageTags: Tags (separate multiple tags by comma or tab)
passwordChangedSuccess: Your password has been changed successfully!
passwordRepeatError: Please enter twice the same new password!
passwordRequirementsError: A password must at least contain one character of {1} and has a minimum length of {2} characters.
passwordResetVerificationError: The authentication token is invalid or has expired already!
preventDataOverwritingError: A newer version has been edited in another browser tab. Please reload this page in order to continue.
repositoriesInfo: In addition to the public collection, you can install custom theme packages from your own GitHub or GitLab repositories — public or private. To install a package, you’ll need to configure authentication by adding a personal access token with read access to the platform’s API — even for public repositories.
repositoryAddInfo: In order to add a public or private repository, please make sure that you have provided a valid access token for the platform where the repository is hosted.
repositoryAlreadyExistsError: A similar repository or package already exists in your configuration
repositoryComposerJsonError: An error occurred while attempting to download the composer.json file from the repository. Please check that the repository URL, package name and branch are correct, and ensure that the file exists at the root of the repository. Make sure you’ve provided the necessary authentication token — even for public repositories — as API access requires it.
repositoryRemoveConfirm: Do you really want to remove the repository and uninstall the related packages?
searchNoResults: Your search did not return any results.
sectionHasNoFields: There are no fields defined in this section.
selectTargetNewPage: Select a location for the new page
signInRateLimitError: Sign-in temporarily blocked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
signedOutSuccess: You have been successfully signed out.
switchingTemplateProgress: The page template is currently being switched, please wait.
systemCacheCardInfo: Clear the cache, purge cached items or change caching settings
systemCacheClearInfo: Clearing the site cache forces a rescan for updated pages and files. This action will not remove any page files or images from the cache directory.
systemCacheInfo: Caching is essential to speed up your site and should generally be enabled. However under some circumstances you might want to disable or clear your cache.
systemCacheLifetimeInfo: All cached Automad data and pages have a maximum lifetime. After the lifetime of an object exceeds, its cache will be rebuilt when requested.
systemCacheMonitorInfo: When caching is enabled, Automad will check regularly for changes in the file system. The frequency of those checks can be defined here.
systemCachePurgeInfo: In contrast to simply clearing the cache, purging the cache directory will also move all temporary files, deleted pages, update-backups and cached images to the temporary directory of the system. This will force a full rebuild of the image and page cache as well as a cleanup of all deleted pages. On most systems the temporary directory will be cleaned up automatically from time to time or on reboot. However, on some systems temporary directories has to be purged manually.
systemDebugBrowser: Show debug log in the browser console
systemDebugBrowserHelp: Optionally, log output can also be forwarded directly to the browser console, which can be helpful when debugging during development.
systemDebugCardInfo: Enable debugging in order to identify issues with your installation
systemDebugFileHelp: To find and inspect the log file for your Automad installation, run the log:path command in the Automad Console and use it directly with familiar Linux or macOS tools like tail, for example:
systemDebugInfo: When debugging is enabled, Automad records all internal processes and PHP warnings in a log file. Optionally, log output can also be forwarded to the browser console. Debugging is intended for development and troubleshooting and should not be enabled in production environments.
systemI18nInfo: Internationalization can be enabled in order to route visitors to pages that are served in the language that matches their locale. Adding languages can be achieved by grouping pages of a particular language under a top-level page that has a two letter language code as slug such as /en or /de. The first top-level page serves as fallback for all languages that are not available on a site.
systemLanguageCardInfo: Change the language for the Automad user interface
systemLanguageInfo: There are several languages available for the Automad user interface. The translations are created automatically. This feature is still in an experimental phase and therefore some translations might not be accurate.
systemMailCardInfo: Configure how emails are sent by your server
systemMailInfo: You can configure how emails are sent for registration, account recovery or from contact forms on the website. By default, Automad uses PHP's sendmail function for this. However, it is recommended to send emails via an SMTP server, whose access data can be entered below.
systemMailReset: Do you want to reset the current email configuration?
systemMailSendTestNoEmail: There is no email address associated with your user account. Please add a valid email address inside the user settings.
systemMailSendTestSuccess: A test email was successfully sent to
systemMailSmtpPasswordPlaceholder: Leave this field empty in order to keep the existing password
systemRssFeedCardInfo: Enable and configure the RSS feed for your site
systemRssFeedFields: You can sort, add or remove the fields that should be included in the RSS feed by dragging them onto one of the two areas below.
systemRssFeedFieldsInfoUnused: Move elements into this area in order to remove them from the RSS feed
systemRssFeedFieldsInfoUsed: Move elements into this area in order to add them to the RSS feed
systemRssFeedInfo: When the RSS feed option is enabled, Automad will automatically generate an RSS feed document and publish it under the URL that is displayed below in order to allow users to follow your newest posts.
systemRssFeedUrl: The RSS feed will be available under the following link. You can add it to your navigation by adding a new page and using the URL below as value for the redirect field.
systemUpdateAvailable:
A newer version of Automad is available and ready to be installed.
Please carefully read the release notes before upgrading and backup your current installation!
systemUpdateCardInfo: Update Automad to the latest available version
systemUpdateConnectionError: Can't connect to the update server! This could typically be caused by a wrong update configuration (config/config.php), a SSL certificate error or a missing cURL library.
systemUpdateFailedError: Update failed! Please restore your installation from a backup.
systemUpdateItems: Note that the following files and directories are affected by the update:
systemUpdateItemsError: Invalid list of items to be updated!
systemUpdateNotSupportedError: Updates are not supported by your server! The updater requires cURL and ZIP libraries to be installed.
systemUpdatePhpVersionError: Your PHP version doesn't support the latest Automad version. Please upgrade PHP to version
systemUpdateProgress: Please wait and don't close the window while updating ...
systemUsersCardInfo: Edit your profile information, change your password or invite other users
systemUsersChangePasswordText: You can update your password at any time to keep your account secure. Choose a strong, unique password that you don’t use elsewhere to better protect your account.
systemUsersCollaborateCreate: Click here to a create new user manually without sending an invite.
systemUsersCollaborateCreateText: If email invites aren’t available, you can create a user here instead.
systemUsersCollaborateInviteText: Enter a unique username and the person’s email address to send an invitation.
systemUsersCollaborateManageText: Review who has access to Automad and remove users if needed.
systemUsersCollaborateText: Invite collaborators to work with you and manage their access in one place. You can add new users and remove access at any time, giving you full control over who can edit your content.
systemUsersSendInvitationSuccess: The invitation has been sent successfully.
systemUsersSignOutAllConfirm: Do you really want to sign out all users including yourself?
systemUsersSignOutAllInfo: In case you want to sign out all users at once, you can use the button below.
systemUsersTotpConfigureDialogText: Scan the QR code or enter the setup key above in your authenticator app. Then enter the 6-digit code below to enable two-factor authentication.
systemUsersTotpDisableConfirmText: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will reduce your account’s security.
systemUsersTotpDisabledSuccessfully: Two factor authentication was disabled successfully
systemUsersTotpText: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a one-time code from your authenticator app when you sign in. This helps protect your account even if your password is compromised. If you ever lose access to your authenticator, you can still recover your account using your email address.
systemUsersYourAccountText: Manage your account details here, including your username and email address. Make sure your email is up to date, as it’s used to recover your account if you lose access.
themeReadme: Open readme file of current theme
trashClearConfirm: Do you really want to clear the trash directory?
trashPermanentlyDeleteConfirm: Do you want to permanently delete this page?
tuneOrMove: Click to tune or drag to move
useUploadedImage: Pick an uploaded image from the server or upload new ones
useUploadedVideo: Pick an uploaded video from the server or upload new ones
verifyTotpCancel: I want to sign in as someone else.
verifyTotpError: That code isn’t valid. Please try again.
